name: Tyr Anasazi
description:
Made on request, unfortunately I know nothing of the show or characters so it's a bit of a shot in the dark. :'D
- - - - - - - - - -
Tyr Anasazi is a supporting character featured in the science fiction television series Andromeda. Played by actor Keith Hamilton Cobb, he first appeared in the series pilot episode, "Under the Night" and appeared in 68 episodes of the series in total. Hamilton left the series at the beginning of season four.
creator: Ronax_Obscure
